h1.visual_description: Large, black, sans-serif font, serving as the primary slide title.
h1.example_text: Upstage offers 3 AI packs that process unstructured information and data, making a tangible impact on your business

h2.visual_description: Small, purple, sans-serif font, used as a section or category identifier at the top-left margin.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Used for section labels and primary table column headers (e.g., OCR, Recommendation).

visual_matchers.pattern: Grid-based layout with thin grey lines
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Represents a structured comparison table with row and column headers.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top-left section labels (e.g., 'AI Pack') and bottom-right page numbers (e.g., '11').
